questions.question: Does clicking data-testid='image-thumbnail' inside ImageMessageBubble open ImageLightbox as a fullscreen Chakra modal (size='full') per AC-51?
Does ImageLightbox render the full-resolution decrypted image via useDecryptedImage(groupId, fullAttachment) as an element with data-testid='lightbox-image' once the blob resolves per AC-52?
Does ImageLightbox render a download button with data-testid='lightbox-download' that, when clicked, triggers a file download with filename matching <sender-shortid>-<YYYYMMDD-HHmm>.<ext> per AC-53?
Does ImageLightbox render a close button with data-testid='lightbox-close' that dismisses the modal per AC-54?
Does pressing Escape while ImageLightbox is open close the modal (via Chakra Modal closeOnEsc default) per AC-55?
Does clicking the modal overlay (outside the image content area) close the modal (via Chakra Modal closeOnOverlayClick) per AC-56?
Does ImageLightbox use copy.groups.imageDownload for the download button aria-label, consistent with the i18n key added in story-01 per spec?
Does ImageMessageBubble accept senderPubkey and createdAt props and pass them as senderShortId (via truncateNpub/pubkeyToNpub) and createdAt to ImageLightbox for filename generation?
Does the download handler create an <a> element with the correct href and download filename, click it programmatically, then remove it — the standard browser-native download pattern?

Per the story test strategy: TypeScript compilation confirms prop contracts (no isolated unit test warranted for a thin modal wrapper); interaction coverage comes from E2E story-09. Does tsc --noEmit pass with zero errors?

answers.evidence: ImageMessageBubble.tsx:49 onClick handler sets lightboxOpen=true when thumb status is 'ready'. Lines 134-142 conditionally render ImageLightbox. ImageLightbox uses Chakra Modal with size='full' (line 58).
ImageLightbox.tsx:44 calls useDecryptedImage(groupId, attachment). Lines 103-112 render <Image data-testid='lightbox-image' src={imageState.url} /> when status==='ready'.

formatFilename() (lines 26-34) constructs ${senderShortId}-${YYYYMMDD}-${HHmm}.${ext}. handleDownload (lines 46-55) creates anchor element with a.download=filename attribute, appends, clicks, removes. Download button disabled while loading (isDisabled on line 84).
ImageLightbox.tsx lines 87-96: IconButton with data-testid='lightbox-close' calls onClick={onClose}.
ImageLightbox.tsx line 63: Chakra Modal closeOnEsc prop set (default true for Chakra modals).
ImageLightbox.tsx line 62: Chakra Modal closeOnOverlayClick prop set (default true for Chakra modals).
ImageLightbox.tsx line 78: IconButton aria-label={copy.groups.imageDownload}. copy from useCopy() hook; key defined in story-01 i18n.ts for en/de.

ImageMessageBubble.tsx lines 14-15 accept senderPubkey and createdAt. Line 33 derives senderShortId via truncateNpub(pubkeyToNpub(senderPubkey)). Lines 138-139 pass both to ImageLightbox. GroupChat.tsx passes msg.senderPubkey and msg.createdAt to ImageMessageBubble.

ImageLightbox.tsx lines 49-54: handleDownload creates <a> element, sets a.href=imageState.url and a.download=filename, appends to document.body, clicks, removes from body. Standard browser-native download pattern.
result.json tsc_errors: 0. No new unit tests (per story test strategy — thin modal wrapper; interaction coverage deferred to E2E story-09). All prop contracts verified via TypeScript compilation.

codex_findings: Codex review gate unavailable (disable-model-invocation). Manual review: all 10 ACs pass. No critical/high issues. Notes: (1) Download button correctly disabled while imageState.status !== 'ready' to prevent empty download. (2) Lightbox uses useDecryptedImage for full-res attachment independently of thumbnail — both share in-flight Promise deduplication map, so no double-fetch. (3) Filename format correct: createdAt is milliseconds timestamp, padded date/time extraction per spec.
